_comment: Off-catalog but Glen-approved remedy / tool / service / therapy links for RemedyMatch auto-open. Grows organically. Keys are remedy/tool/service names; matching is case-insensitive (exact or substring, name length > 4). Value is a URL string, or an object {"url": "...", "note": "...", "affiliate": true}. Catalog products do NOT go here, those resolve via product-aliases.json. Only add links you trust to open in a new tab. The amzn.to links below are Glen's own Amazon Associates affiliate links (tag healoasi02-20), mined from his sent email 2026-05-30 (see 00 Projects/remedymatch/amazon-affiliate-products.md). Entries with "affiliate": true ALSO render in the funnel's 'Recommended Tools & Partners' section on /begin/explore (begin_funnel.partner_links()); unflagged entries stay name-resolve / auto-open only.

E4L Bioenergetic Scan.note: Energy For Life 10-second voice scan / Biofield Analysis

Heated Eye Mask.note: Silk cordless warm compress for dry eyes / stye / tired eyes. Glen's most-recommended Amazon pick (15x).

Eyelid Foaming Cleanser.note: NOVEHA lavender + tea tree eyelid foaming cleanser for Demodex / MGD / stye. Glen Amazon pick (12x).

Water Distiller.note: GarveeHome 1 gal stainless countertop water distiller. Glen Amazon pick.

Vibration Plate.note: Lifepro Waver mini vibration plate for lymphatic drainage. Glen Amazon pick.

Creatine Monohydrate.note: BulkSupplements micronized creatine monohydrate, 1 kg. Glen Amazon pick.

EAV Electro Acupuncture Device.note: EAV diagnostic device (Voll method). Glen Amazon pick.

Blushield.note: Blushield active scalar EMF protection devices. Glen's own affiliate link (affiliate area: blushield-us.com/my-account/affiliate-area/).
